title: metrosideros ramiflora var. villosa
intro: Metrosideros ramiflora var. villosa, also known as the hairy rata, is a variety of the Metrosideros ramiflora plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Metrosideros ramiflora var. villosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional Maori medicine, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
